title: Clean and maintain livestock pens
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean and maintain livestock pens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean pens

pcs.text: Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the pens and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the pens and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the pens and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts.

pcs.text: Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the pens and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the pens and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the pens and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operations.
